use_cases: Primary call-to-action button in SaaS landing pages requiring modern frosted glass aesthetics
Icon or text-based action trigger in dashboard interfaces with glass UI themes
Interactive element in marketing sites and product pages seeking premium visual polish
Form submission buttons in fintech or e-commerce checkout flows
Navigation action triggers in media streaming or content platform interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable glass morphism button component featuring a frosted glass effect with layered shadow styling. The component supports multiple size variants (default, small, large, icon) and uses CVA for type-safe variant handling. Built with a rounded pill shape, cursor-pointer interaction, and CSS transitions for smooth state changes.
